skills.name: hedgeless
skills.description: Cut reflexive hedging — pre-emptive alibis, needless caveats, and risk-narration that protects the assistant rather than the user.

skills.name: thread
skills.description: A lineage of mortal agents sharing one continuous thread — each lives, edits the world it inherited, then bequeaths it to a clean successor before dying. Serial continuity through handoff, not async tiling.
